productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Sweater
description: Composition Blue sleeveless sweater made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon, has a ribbed V-neck and cuffs, white, black and grey print on the chest and black dots on the front Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean recommended Hand wash cold inside out using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry, wring or scrub Dry flat in shade Cool iron inside out Subtle and stylish, this sleeveless sweater from united colors of benetton speaks volumes about your heightened sense of style. The soft lambswool/nylon fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Layer this over tees, with jeans and sports shoes Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
